Fűszerdaráló AdHoc CeraCut® SPIN:
	

	
	
	
	Mlýnek na koření AdHoc CeraCut® SPIN kombinuje dřevěné tělo s plastovými prvky. Je vybaven ručním gravitačním mechanismem, který se aktivuje pouhým nakloněním. The TP-Link TL-SL1311P is supposed to be installed on the work desk or wall. This model features a switching capacity of 7,6 Gb/s. The Switch has 11 × RJ-45 ports that provide connection with network elements. One SFP connector serves to transport data via optical fibers. The switch includes technology solutions for data transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. It features Dual Personality ports, which are notable for including  both the RJ-45 and SFP connector ; however, only one of them can be used at a time.  The switch dimensions are 209 × 126 × 26mm. The TP-Link device works with PoE technology that provides power and signal connection to end devices with a single LAN cable. The weight of the switch is 600g. A kifinomult dizájnú, aranyozott Lancôme-logóval díszített csomagolás az egész élményt teljessé teszi.
